summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU issues with Morpheus devices(VOY5200,VOY8200)
scenario: DFU issues on Morpheus devices: language update stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes, FW update shows available update after completion, and DFU stuck at 26% during active call without expected pop-up.
description_clean:
Three DFU issues with Morpheus devices (VOY5200, VOY8200):

1. Language update stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes before completing (split to LMW-2609). Expected completion within 2 minutes.

2. After successful FW update, the device still shows an available update instead of being up to date.

3. DFU process stuck at 26% when a phone call is active. Expected: a pop-up saying "Cannot update this device during a call".
steps: 1. Perform a language update on a Morpheus device (VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Observe the progress bar during the language update.
3. Note the time taken for the update to complete.
4. After a successful FW update, check the device's update status.
5. Initiate a DFU process while a phone call is active on the device.
6. Observe the behavior of the DFU process during the active call.
expected: 1. Language update completes within 2 minutes. 2. After successful FW update, device shows 'up to date'. 3. During an active call, a pop-up appears saying 'Cannot update this device during a call'.
actual: 1. Language update stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes before completing. 2. After successful FW update, device still shows an available update. 3. DFU process stuck at 26% when a phone call is active (no pop-up appears).
